name: Blank Slate
description: The fastest start. Two colors, three roles, five named variations. Swap the seed colors and you have a working system in under a minute.

name: nClarity
description: Personal mobile app preset — Direct mode, Light + Dark + Midnight, full semantic role system with button contrast chaining, icon tray fills, status roles, and alpha tints at 5–95.

config.name: nClarity
config.description: Personal mobile app — iOS-tuned Light, Dark, and Midnight themes with full semantic roles.

name: TW Scale Full
description: Scale mode showcase. Every feature enabled: 15 nested colors, 9 roles with custom variations, status roles scoped to their color, alpha tints, scale collection, per-color algorithm.

name: TW Direct Full
description: Direct mode showcase. Every feature: 15 nested colors, localBg on on/fill (dynamic token ref per color), per-role solver overrides, alpha tints, 3 themes, scoped status roles.

name: Token Wand UI
description: Token Wand's own interface system. 5 colors × 6 universal roles = every token the plugin needs. Icons share the text role. Status colors get all role tokens automatically. Poetic: the plugin styles itself.

config.name: Token Wand UI
config.description: The plugin's own color system — use Token Wand to style Token Wand.

colors.description: Neutral gray — drives all surfaces, borders, and text

colors.description: Figma blue — CTA, focus ring, active tab, accent

colors.description: Destructive actions — delete, error banners, danger fills

colors.name: Success
colors.description: Positive confirmation — toast, sync success, saved state

colors.name: Warning
colors.description: Caution — blocked actions, degraded state, attention

name: Regular Wand
description: Clean professional system. Full semantic layer stack — backgrounds, surfaces, borders, fills, text. Swap the seed colors and ship.

colors.name: Brand/Accent

name: TW Pro
description: Full system. Direct mode, global brand constants + alpha tints, 3 themes. Per-role semantic variation groups for Surface, Text, Status, Outline, and Inverse.

name: TW Funk
description: Maximum chroma at every contrast level. High-energy variation names, 3 vivid themes. Built for bold creative products.

name: TW Native
description: Token Wand's native system. Palette (7 colors) → Role (what the color does) → Variation (state within that role). Path: Brand/button/hover, Neutral/text/base, Danger/fill/disabled.

name: Radix UI
description: Radix's 12-step semantic scale. Role = purpose layer (background, element, border, solid, text). Variation = named slot within that layer. Matches Radix Themes and shadcn/ui token namespace.

name: Apple HIG
description: iOS/macOS adaptive semantic colors. Role = Apple color family (label, fill, background, separator). Variation = tier (primary → quaternary). Fixed system color primitives in a separate collection.

name: Tailwind CSS
